'''Sukarian''' was a [[Vicebaron]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]] who [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] tried to get information out. Mara despised the assignment as she had to play a giddy, no-brained girl due to Sukarian's sexism towards females.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
